common.start_adding: Start by adding your first nautical asset

lp.hero_title: Your yacht is not just a boat. It is a
lp.hero_subtitle: The digital custody that gathers, organizes and safeguards the entire history of your nautical asset. Documents, images and reports — dated, geolocated and tamper-proof. The standard that protects, enhances and accelerates the sale of your patrimony.
lp.dossier_subtitle: Trust closes deals faster: certified dossiers, safer negotiations, and measurable value appreciation.
lp.cat_compact_desc: Dossier for sport boats and day cruisers. Agility and security for entry-level assets.
lp.cat_executive_desc: The gold standard for luxury yachts. Rigorous technical, engine, and electrical audit for the global market.
lp.cat_superyacht_desc: Ultra-complexity asset management. International compliance and full structural legacy traceability.
lp.pricing_subtitle: Total transparency: Software license for Marinas ($250/month, no lock-in). Dossiers paid by the owner generate an automatic 50% payout to the Marina and 50% to Yachts Atlas via Stripe Connect.
lp.mission_tagline: Digital custody platform for high-value yacht assets, with real-time auditing and tracking.
lp.trust_quote: A Yacht is not just a boat. It is a high-value financial asset. We ensure its digital legacy is as flawless as its engineering.
lp.tech_1_desc: Write Once Read Many. Data immutability guaranteed by cryptographic silos.
lp.tech_2_desc: Digital fingerprinting for every maintenance record and technical update.
lp.tech_3_desc: Audited trails recognized by international brokers and maritime authorities.
lp.benefit_1_desc: An asset with an audited history is worth up to 20% more in the secondary market.
lp.benefit_2_desc: Reduce sale time by up to 60% with the transparency of our dossier.
lp.benefit_3_desc: Partnerships with insurers for premium reduction based on real data.
lp.benefit_4_desc: Full tracking of maintenance and documents without bureaucracy.
lp.footer_tagline: Yachts Atlas • Digital Integrity • Maritime Excellence

auth.standard_desc: Access the world's most rigorous maritime asset management platform. Protect your fleet's legacy with cryptographic precision.

marina_onboarding.step_3_title: THE GLOBAL STANDARD FOR NAUTICAL CUSTODY
marina_onboarding.benefit_marina_text: Beyond centralizing fleet management and monitoring critical expirations, Yachts Atlas opens a new revenue stream for your marina. You become the certifying authority, offering and monetizing the issuance of Integrity Dossiers to your clients subtly and recurringly.
marina_onboarding.benefit_insurance_text: End uncertainties in negotiations. With an auditable and immutable history, insurers reduce risk and brokers accelerate sales. Having a Yachts Atlas integrity seal makes the asset much more liquid and desired in the international market, facilitating complex due diligence.
marina_onboarding.benefit_owner_text: The owner stops having just an asset and starts having a certified asset. An asset with a complete Cryptographic Dossier is worth up to 30% more on resale, as it proves every penny invested in maintenance. It is the security of knowing that the wealth is being appreciated while under your care.
marina_onboarding.closing_text: "How much does it cost for your marina to deal with documentary disorganization today? And worse: how much does your client lose in money on resale by not having an auditable history of the asset? The luxury market demands traceability. Marinas that do not offer digital security are losing space to the future. Protect your fleet's legacy today and transform your management into a profit center."
marina_onboarding.footer_terms: By finalizing, you agree to the terms of digital custody and immutable security of the Atlas standard.
